brms Post-Processing Functions for the Shifted Loglogistic Family

Source: R/dist-shifted-loglogistic.R
shifted_loglogistic-brms-posthooks.Rd

Companion functions to brms_custom_shifted_loglogistic that enable brms::loo(), brms::posterior_predict(), and brms::posterior_epred() (plus related helpers) on brmsfits using the shifted-loglogistic custom family.

Usage

log_lik_shifted_loglogistic(i, prep)

posterior_predict_shifted_loglogistic(i, prep, ...)

posterior_epred_shifted_loglogistic(prep)

Arguments

i

Integer observation index (1-based).

prep

brms preparation object.

...

Forwarded extra arguments (ignored).

Value

log_lik_shifted_loglogistic

Log-density vector.

posterior_predict_shifted_loglogistic

One predictive draw per posterior sample.

posterior_epred_shifted_loglogistic

Conditional mean matrix. The mean is finite only when \(\xi < 1\); otherwise the return is NaN for those draws.

Details

The conditional mean of the shifted loglogistic is $$E[Y] = \mu + \sigma \, (\Gamma(1 + \xi) \Gamma(1 - \xi) - 1) / \xi \quad (\xi < 1, \xi \neq 0),$$ with the logistic limit \(E[Y] = \mu\) at \(\xi = 0\).

On this page
